allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path 'e:\\Dev XRoad\\roadstory' -Recurse -Exclude 'node_modules' | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object FullName, Length | Sort-Object FullName)

PowerShell(@\('app', 'lib', 'hooks', 'scripts', 'web'\) | ForEach-Object { $path = "e:\\Dev XRoad\\roadstory\\$_"; Write-Host "=== $_ ===" -ForegroundColor Yellow; if \(Test-Path $path\) { ls -Recurse $path } else { "NOT FOUND" } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "e:\\Dev XRoad\\roadstory\\scripts\\poi-import" -Recurse -Exclude node_modules | Where-Object { $_.PSIsContainer -eq $false } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | Sort-Object)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "e:\\Dev XRoad\\roadstory\\scripts\\poi-import" -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules' } | Select-Object FullName | Sort-Object FullName)

hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreCompact","additionalContext":"IMPORTANT: Before this compaction, update CLAUDE.md at e:\\Dev XRoad\\roadstory\\CLAUDE.md with any new screens, migrations, hooks, server routes, or architectural decisions made this session. Use the Edit or Write tool to update it now, then compaction can proceed."},"systemMessage":"⚠️ Context full — Claude is updating CLAUDE.md before compaction."}'
echo '{"systemMessage":"📝 Done. Update CLAUDE.md if significant changes were made this session."}'
